meta.title: Askim long wanpela projek bilong helpim ol man long i go long ol narapela hap

hero.title: Askim long wanpela projek bilong helpim ol man long i go long ol narapela hap
hero.lead: IATF i save skelim ol askim i kam long ol projek bilong helpim ol man long i go long ol buk na nius samting.
support: I no gat wok long stori long olgeta samting, tasol yu mas save gut long dispela hevi, em bai painim husat, na bilong wanem em i bikpela samting.

header.title: Makim rot i no hatwok long bihainim

intro: Olgeta rot i insait long wankain wok painimaut.

items.label: Websait
items.body: Yu ken yusim fom i stap daunbilo long salim askim bilong yu.

items.label: E-meil bilong yu
items.body: salim askim i go stret long {{contact.requestsEmail}}Ol askim bilong e-meil inap kamap ol rekod bilong ol askim bilong ol man bihain long ol i skelim na redim ol.

items.label: Pasin bilong Toktok Nogut
items.body: Kirap long dispela hap sapos i no hatwok long mekim olsem.

guidance.title: Paslain long yu salim askim
paragraphs: IATF i save mekim wok long ples klia. Ol askim i ken bungim na pablisaim olsem ol rekod bilong ol askim i stap long GitHub, long dispela websait, o long tupela wantaim.
No ken raitim ol atres, fon namba, nem bilong ol dokta, o ol narapela infomesen long ol man i yusim ol dispela samting, sapos i no gat wok long mekim olsem na yu orait long IATF i ken skelim.
IATF i save rausim ol samting i no gat wok long en bilong ol man i ken toktok wantaim ol paslain long ol i kamapim ol rekod bilong ol askim bilong ol.

review.title: Skelim Ol Samting Ol Man i Laik Kisim
paragraphs: Sapos yu givim wanpela askim, dispela i no makim olsem ol bai orait long en.
IATF i save skelim ol samting ol i askim long en, olsem ol dispela samting i stret long mekim wok bilong ol, o ol i gutpela samting long mekim, na ol i laik save, dispela wok i bilong ol man o nogat.
Ol i ken tok nogat long sampela samting ol i askim long en, o ol i ken surikim, o stretim sampela samting paslain long ol i orait long en.

fields.name: Kontek Rot
fields.label: Gutpela rot bilong toktok wantaim ol narapela
fields.helper: Olsem wanem ol i ken skelim ol dispela samting?

fields.name: KontekTingting
fields.label: Kontektim ol
fields.helper: E-mail adres o Discord adres bilong yu long bihainim.
fields.placeholder: E-mail adres o nem bilong Discord

fields.name: tokples
fields.label: Tok Pisin
fields.helper: Tok yu laikim, sapos i stret.

fields.name: hevi
fields.label: Yu laik stretim wanem hevi?
fields.helper: Stori long ol samting i pasim rot bilong yu long autim tok.

fields.name: ol man i kisim hevi
fields.label: Dispela i mekim wanem long husat?

fields.name: extraKontekst
fields.label: Sampela stori moa
fields.helper: Stori long ol narapela samting we inap helpim yu long kliagut long samting yu mas mekim: as na em i bikpela samting, ol eksampel, ol riferens, wanpela tingting bilong program, o taim bilong mekim ol samting.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Yu amamas long mekim wok painimaut long ol samting i stap long kompiuta?
fields.helper: Ol projek em IATF i orait long en, ol i bilong ol man i ken save long en.

header.kicker: Sapos ol i orait long en
header.title: Wanem mining bilong tok orait

items: wanpela pablik repozitori insait long IATF GitHub oganaisesen
wanpela ensinia i gat wok long mekim wok long dispela projek
copyleft laisens bilong kod na ol samting bilong projek
wok bilong kamapim long ples bilong putim ol buk

header.title: Wanpela sotpela askim tasol i inap long kirapim wok

paragraphs: Sapos yu pilim olsem yu mas helpim ol man long kisim save long ol tok bilong Baibel, yu ken salim dispela tok i go long mipela.
